steps.observation:
Here is a 3-sentence summary of the text:

Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) combines retrieval and generative models to improve performance. Common evaluation metrics for retrieval tasks include Precision@k, Recall@k, and Mean Reciprocal Rank. Other concepts discussed in the text include instruction tuning, hallucination, and causal self-attention.

final_answer: The key idea behind Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is combining a retrieval component with a generative model to improve performance by fetching relevant passages from an external corpus based on user queries.
